title: stellaria longipes subsp. stricta
intro: Stellaria longipes subsp. stricta is a subspecies of the Stellaria longipes plant, commonly known as stiff-stemmed starwort or starwort. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and is believed to have antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Stellaria longipes subsp. stricta can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
